context_label: Document-level amendment reconciliation retains every official filing. Links are annotations supported by explicit source fields, official report dates, and transaction signatures when available; no source record is overwritten.

reconciliation_policy.senate_link_rule: same exact filer and report type, predecessor filed no more than 45 days earlier, then unique score of at least 80 with a margin of 15 based on official report dates and exact normalized transaction-signature overlap
